name: Classic Cornbread
tagline: Cast-iron cornbread, crisp crust, tender crumb — Southern style
highlight: Hot pan, cold batter — crackly crust every time

hero.alt: Wedge of cornbread with crisp crust in cast iron
hero.caption: cornbread — cast-iron crisp

healthFacts: Whole-grain cornmeal retains the germ — fiber and antioxidants intact.
Buttermilk's acid activates leavening for tall, tender cornbread.

steps.title: Preheat cast iron
steps.detail: Place a 10-inch cast iron skillet in a 425°F oven. Heat 10 minutes — the pan must be searing hot.
steps.tip: Cold pan = sad bottom. Hot pan = crackly crust.

steps.title: Whisk dry, then wet
steps.detail: Whisk cornmeal, flour, baking powder, soda, salt, sugar (if using). In a separate bowl, whisk buttermilk, eggs, melted butter (cooled).
steps.tip: Hot melted butter scrambles the eggs — let it cool.

steps.title: Combine, leave lumpy
steps.detail: Pour wet into dry; fold gently. Stop while lumps remain.

steps.title: Pour into screaming pan
steps.detail: Pull skillet from oven. Add 1 tbsp butter, swirl to coat. Pour batter — should sizzle. Bake 22 min until top is golden and a toothpick comes clean.
steps.tip: The sizzle when the batter hits the pan is the sound of victory.
